summary: Classified all nine hydrated open PRs in plan mode. Three PRs (#93404, #93411, #93417) have security-boundary or trust-boundary signals and are quarantined with route_security. The other six PRs remain independent inventory items with no shared canonical, no close path, and no merge/fix path under this job's blocked actions.

actions.reason: Security-boundary and secret/network/integrity packaging signals put this PR outside ProjectClownfish backlog triage; route only this item to central OpenClaw security handling.
Focused PR with its own scope; failing proof blocks merge-style treatment but does not make it a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Small plausible fix should stay independently reviewable; this plan job cannot merge or close it.
Authenticated node identity and gateway tool capability-scope changes are security-boundary signals; quarantine this PR with route_security rather than ordinary backlog classification.
Distinct Discord behavior fix with failed proof gate; keep independently rather than close or merge.
Telegram live-preview PR has unique scope and active proof requirements; not a duplicate or close candidate.

Plugin/runtime install trust propagation is a security-sensitive trust-boundary signal; route this item to central OpenClaw security handling without closing, merging, or fixing it through ProjectClownfish.
Distinct Telegram inbound rich-message fix remains under validation; keep independently and do not close while proof/checks are unsettled.
Small test-only PR is not closable under this shard's low-signal permissions; keep independently for normal review.
